_comment: VS Code equivalent of .opencode/plugins/sce-bash-policy.ts. PreToolUse fires before any tool runs; the script inspects the tool input and must echo a JSON 'hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision' value (allow|deny|ask) on stdout, or exit code 2 to block. Port the TypeScript bash-policy runtime to a small Node/shell wrapper that reads stdin JSON, evaluates the staged command against .opencode/lib/bash-policy-presets.json (or a relocated copy), and writes the decision JSON. Reference docs: https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/hooks
